title: Systemd, systemdhook and SELinux - systemd fails to start in container.
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

> Uncomment only one, leave it on its own line:
>
/kind bug
>
> /kind feature

**Description**

I'm unable to run container with systemd as PID 1.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `systemd-run podman run -t --name=systemd --env=container=podman --entrypoint=/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 fedora:28`

**Describe the results you received:**
Freshly installed and updated Fedora 28.

First attempt:
- SELinux in enforcing mode
- podman run without `--privileged` option

```
# systemd-run podman run -t --name=systemd --env=container=podman --entrypoint=/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 fedora:28
```
Podman logs: https://paste.fedoraproject.org/paste/GJDGfyeusHfW9lM001Ux3g

SELinux attributes:
```
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 5 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 .
dr-xr-xr-x. 6 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:13 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:20 conmon
drwxr-xr-x. 3 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 libpod-15b1e3352137c435eea1c77f73ca4fca4c9e538d3061bdf606a635d4e4b2a1b2
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 notify_on_release
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 tasks
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/libpod-15b1e3352137c435eea1c77f73ca4fca4c9e538d3061bdf606a635d4e4b2a1b2/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 3 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 .
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:32 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:22 init.scope
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 notify_on_release
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:22 tasks
```

Audit log:
```
type=AVC msg=audit(1533615761.964:238): avc:  denied  { write } for  pid=1771 comm="systemd" name="release_agent" dev="cgroup" ino=7 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c252,c476 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
type=AVC msg=audit(1533615761.964:239): avc:  denied  { write } for  pid=1771 comm="systemd" name="cgroup.procs" dev="cgroup" ino=559 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c252,c476 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
type=AVC msg=audit(1533615761.965:240): avc:  denied  { rmdir } for  pid=1771 comm="systemd" name="init.scope" dev="cgroup" ino=558 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c252,c476 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=0
```

Second attempt:
- selinux in enforcing mode
- podman run with `--privileged` option
```
# systemd-run podman run -t --privileged --name=systemd --env=container=podman --entrypoint=/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 fedora:28
```
Podman logs: https://paste.fedoraproject.org/paste/Jdse3Zs99nTTDPKBdq9W7w

SELinux attributes:
```
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:39 .
dr-xr-xr-x. 6 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:13 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:20 conmon
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 libpod-46b3f9b1e33f8000119997713f9547e38af96438ec387608c05b3260249fb7ac
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 notify_on_release
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 tasks
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/libpod-46b3f9b1e33f8000119997713f9547e38af96438ec387608c05b3260249fb7ac/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 .
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c252,c476 0 Aug  7 06:39 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 init.scope
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 notify_on_release
drwxr-xr-x. 6 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 system.slice
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:39 tasks
```
No new entries in audit log.


Third attempt:
- SELinux in permissive mode
- podman run without `--privileged` option

```
# setenforce 0
systemd-run podman run -t --name=systemd --env=container=podman --entrypoint=/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 fedora:28
```
Podman logs: https://paste.fedoraproject.org/paste/vvEbvfhfyjiXlqVwHZcQAg

SELinux attributes:
```
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 .
dr-xr-xr-x. 6 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:13 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:20 conmon
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 libpod-cb73ec235a29c26625db392034010161809fefbc21291c579d0aa550f629f710
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 notify_on_release
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 06:30 tasks
# ls -laZ /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/libpod-cb73ec235a29c26625db392034010161809fefbc21291c579d0aa550f629f710/
total 0
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 .
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 ..
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 cgroup.procs
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 07:02 init.scope
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 notify_on_release
drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0                   0 Aug  7 07:02 system.slice
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c803,c888 0 Aug  7 07:02 tasks
```

Audit log:
```
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.597:356): avc:  denied  { write } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="release_agent" dev="cgroup" ino=7 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=1
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.622:357): avc:  denied  { write } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="system.slice" dev="cgroup" ino=763 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=1
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.622:358): avc:  denied  { add_name } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="systemd-journal-catalog-update.service" scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=1
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.622:359): avc:  denied  { create } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="systemd-journal-catalog-update.service" scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=1
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.631:360): avc:  denied  { remove_name } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="systemd-journal-catalog-update.service" dev="cgroup" ino=768 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=1
type=AVC msg=audit(1533618163.631:361): avc:  denied  { rmdir } for  pid=2674 comm="systemd" name="systemd-journal-catalog-update.service" dev="cgroup" ino=768 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c803,c888 tcontext=system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=1
```

Fourth attempt:
- SELinux in permissive mode
- podman run with `--privileged` option

Result similar to the second attempt. Only `/sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/` was relabeled to match container label. `/sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/libpod-<id>` and its content was labeled with `system_u:object_r:cgroup_t:s0`.

**Describe the results you expected:**
systemd starts correctly in a container without `--privileged`

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Interesting thing is that `/sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/libpod_parent/` is modified each time to match SELinux label of last launched container. In all cases, I was unable to finish systemd "boot" process in the container.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.7.4
Go Version:    go1.10.3
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
host:
  MemFree: 7338647552
  MemTotal: 8361369600
  SwapFree: 536866816
  SwapTotal: 536866816
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 2
  hostname: localhost.localdomain
  kernel: 4.17.11-200.fc28.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 2h 36m 29.33s (Approximately 0.08 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - quay.io
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 1
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.mountopt=nodev
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
  ImageStore:
    number: 1
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Same behavior on bare-metal and KVM virtual machine.

comments.body:
Do you have the container_manage_cgroup enabled o each machine?

getsebool -a | grep container

setsebool -P container_manage_cgroup 1
This is working fine for me in a container,  I will close thinking you had not turned on the boolean.

Opening this issue back up because I am able to recreate the original user's issue. 

Brand new Fedora 28 KDE system. 

dnf update -y
dnf install podman -y 

getsebool -a | grep container
container_connect_any --> off
container_manage_cgroup --> on
logrotate_read_inside_containers --> off

podman run -it --name=systemd --env=container=podman --entrypoint=/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 fedora

```
systemd 238 running in system mode. (+PAM +AUDIT +SELINUX +IMA -APPARMOR +SMACK +SYSVINIT +UTMP +LIBCRYPTSETUP +GCRYPT +GNUTLS +ACL +XZ +LZ4 +SECCOMP +BLKID +ELFUTILS +KMOD +IDN2 -IDN +PCRE2 default-hierarchy=hybrid)
Detected virtualization container-other.
Detected architecture x86-64.

Welcome to Fedora 28 (Twenty Eight)!

Set hostname to <338241e93569>.
Initializing machine ID from random generator.
Failed to read AF_UNIX datagram queue length, ignoring: No such file or directory
Failed to install release agent, ignoring: No such file or directory
Failed to create /user.slice/user-1000.slice/session-2.scope/init.scope control group: No such file or directory
Failed to allocate manager object: No such file or directory
[!!!!!!] Failed to allocate manager object, freezing.
Freezing execution.
```

@egriffith One note - you don't need `--env container=podman`, Podman should add that automatically
@egriffith are you running this in a nonroot container?  There is no cgroup support in nonroot containers so I don't see us supporting systemd in this mode, until we get support.

Hi there I was wondering if there is any chance to re-open this?

I am running following on Fedora 28 as unprivileged user:
podman run --entrypoint=/usr/sbin/init --stop-signal=RTMIN+3 -t --privileged fedora:29

And here is my output:
systemd 239 running in system mode. (+PAM +AUDIT +SELINUX +IMA -APPARMOR +SMACK +SYSVINIT +UTMP +LIBCRYPTSETUP +GCRYPT +GNUTLS +ACL +XZ +LZ4 +SECCOMP +BLKID +ELFUTILS +KMOD +IDN2 -IDN +PCRE2 default-hierarchy=hybrid)

Failed to allocate manager object: Permission denied

This is fixed when running Podman as root. The latest versions should also work with rootless, though I believe a patched systemd is required (https://github.com/systemd/systemd/pull/10646 - it's merged but I'm not sure if it's made its way into a release as well). Regardless, this is definitely a separate issue, so I'd recommend you open a new issue.
